name: Transferring Files with Credential Data via Network Shares
notes:
This rule detects attempts to transfer files with well-known filenames (sensitive files with credential data) using network shares.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Transferring Files with Credential Data via Network Shares
SIGMA Description: Transferring files with well-known filenames (sensitive files with credential data) using network shares


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

when the event matches Payload Contains is Relative Target Name: samr, Event Name is any of [Failure Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access or Success Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access]
when the event QID is one of the following (5001471) Success Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access, (5001469) Failure Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access
when the event matches File Path (custom) contains any of [mimidrv or lsass or minidump or hiberfil or sqldmpr or sam or ntds.dit or \security]
TD_list: APPLY Transferring Files with Credential Data via Network Shares on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

AND NOT when the event matches Payload Contains is Relative Target Name: samr, Event Name is any of [Failure Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access or Success Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access]
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001471) Success Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access, (5001469) Failure Audit: Network Share Object Checked for Access
AND when the event matches File Path (custom) contains any of [mimidrv or lsass or minidump or hiberfil or sqldmpr or sam or ntds.dit or \security]
RED_list: Event name: Transferring Files with Credential Data via Network Shares
Event description: Detects attempts to transfer files with well-known filenames (sensitive files with credential data) using network shares.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
